query:
SELECT 'Total Customers' as metric, COUNT(*) as value FROM customers
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Recent Segment', COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE segment = 'recent'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Lapsed Segment', COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE segment = 'lapsed'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Unknown Segment', COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE segment = 'unknown'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'New Segment', COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE segment = 'new'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'With Email', COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE email IS NOT NULL AND email != ''
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Commercial', COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE customerType = 'commercial'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'SMS Campaign Sent', COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE smsCampaignSent = 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'With Balance Due', COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE balanceDue > 0
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Invalid Phone (too short)', COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE LENGTH(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(phone, '(', ''), ')', ''), '-', ''), ' ', '')) < 10
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Duplicate Phones', COUNT(*) - COUNT(DISTINCT phone) FROM customers
